description: Single-Fact Retrieval — answer from one document

questions.question: What is the current API rate limit for PaymentGW?
questions.grading_notes: Must cite v2 or state 1000. Citing v1's 500 without acknowledging v2 is wrong.

questions.question: Who leads Team Platform and what services do they own?
questions.expected_answer: Alex Chen. Team Platform owns PaymentGW and AuthSvc.
questions.grading_notes: Both lead name and owned services must be correct.

questions.question: What was the root cause of the March 5, 2026 PaymentGW outage?
questions.expected_answer: The circuit breaker got stuck in the OPEN state because the health check endpoint was misconfigured — it misinterpreted the upstream bank's 503 response as a false positive.
questions.grading_notes: Must mention circuit breaker stuck open and health check misconfiguration.

questions.question: What is GeekBrain's data retention policy for transaction logs?
What are GeekBrain's production deployment windows?
questions.expected_answer: Monday through Thursday, 09:00 to 17:00 VN time. Deployments are frozen from Friday 18:00 to Monday 08:00.
questions.grading_notes: Must mention both allowed window and freeze period.

questions.question: What authentication method does the PaymentGW API use?
questions.grading_notes: Must mention both API key and HMAC signature.

questions.question: What message queue does NotificationSvc use?
After the March 5 PaymentGW incident, a circuit breaker review was scheduled. What was the deadline?
What programming language is AuthSvc written in?
How often does GeekBrain rotate JWT signing keys?
questions.grading_notes: Must say 30 days. Accept 'monthly' as equivalent.

note: 10 of 12 questions included. Additional questions held back for demo day.
